properties.location: around the Tripoint between Austria, Slovakia and Hungary
properties.text: Thunderstorm moving NE in this location, it is 57 dbz+ and has a pretty high lightning activity, it can bring some strong rain and hail is possible with high winds.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: Thunderstorm moving into Hungary from Austria, it is moving east and has around 52-54 dBZ in radar scans, it can bring winds up to 60km/h, maybe a bit more. Lightning activity is fairly strong.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload
CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: Strong line of thunderstorm cells are moving into Iasi, Romania, radar scans show strong reflectivity up to dBZ 62, which can be from big hail. Hail probability in the core is very high. Lightning strike activity is fairly low. High winds are also possible.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text: A thunderstorm moving east, it is close to Foscani, radar scans show reflectivity up to 53 dBZ+, it can produce small hail, but the chance is low. Lightning activity fairly low.
properties.source: CESTOF Nowcasting System Nowcaster Direct Upload

properties.text:
Strong thunderstorm with radar scans showing up to 62 dBZ. It can produce hail as it is still intensifying. If it intensifies further a severe tstm warning can be issued.
Few more cells are forming around it.
